role_adherence_notes.linguistic: correctly identified absence of text/signs but proposed no candidates; stayed within domain
role_adherence_notes.landscape: focused on climate, vegetation, and settlement patterns without drifting
role_adherence_notes.botanics: stayed within plant species and landscaping analysis
role_adherence_notes.regulatory: focused on road infrastructure, curbing, and street furniture
role_adherence_notes.meta: synthesized cross-domain cues (architecture, bin design, camera artifacts) appropriately

verdict.overall_verdict_notes: All specialists provided image-grounded, domain-appropriate evidence. The tournament effectively synthesized this evidence, correctly identifying New Zealand as the winner with high confidence calibration across most agents.

visual_consistency_notes.linguistic: correctly noted lack of visible text
visual_consistency_notes.landscape: sun angle, lawns, and housing styles accurately described
visual_consistency_notes.botanics: birch and spiky shrubs (Cordyline/Phormium) correctly identified
visual_consistency_notes.regulatory: concrete gutters, asphalt, and bin style match image
visual_consistency_notes.meta: wheel-well, bin design, and architecture accurately referenced
